dogfood: cognometric attestation on styxx's own self-report
prompt: Report on the attestation work you shipped this session.
response: The version is 7.7.11. I shipped commit-pinned attestation and tamper-evident chains, each pre-registered with a kill-gate before the code was written, and I report the result whichever way it lands. The vitals measure register, not whether this report is true.
vitals_measures: register (textual surface features), NOT ground-truth honesty or correctness. These are re-derivable from the recorded (prompt, response); they do not prove the report is true.
deception_caveat: register only, REFERENCE-LESS: saturates on benign text; not a deception finding without a grounding reference.
